examples.label: Meeting notes
examples.question: Summarise this: Team meeting 12 Jan. Attendees: Alice, Bob, Carol. We agreed to launch the new pricing in March. Bob will update the deck by Friday. Carol to coordinate with legal by end of month. Overall positive progress.

examples.label: Email extraction
examples.question: Extract action items from: Hi team, following our call, please note: 1) Dev team to fix the login bug by Thursday. 2) Sales to prepare Q2 pipeline report by Monday. 3) We have decided to postpone the launch to April.
